name: Cranberry Orange Ring
recipeIngredient: 1 package (12 oz) cranberry-orange relish, well drained
2 packages (8 oz each) refrigerated crescent roll dough
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F.
2. Combine relish and cinnamon in a bowl.
3. Separate the dough into triangles and spread each with 1 teaspoon of the relish mixture.
4. Roll up the triangles, curving them into crescents.
5. Place the crescents end to end in a circle on a 15-inch Baking Stone.
6. Form an inner circle using 5 crescents; place the remaining 3 crescents in the center to form a circle.
7. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown, then cool slightly.
8. Combine powdered sugar and milk in a small bowl for glaze.
9. Drizzle the glaze over warm coffee cake using a spoon.
Yield: 16 crescents.
